title: Monday.com to track and manage support requests!
excerpt:
Hey everyone, 
We use Monday.com to mange our support requests. It works great. This use case is best described in the Monday.com Story that’s live here: Success stories | monday.com

posts.author: Gretchen (Gretchen Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,
We use Monday.com to mange our support requests. It works great. This use case is best described in the Monday.com Story that’s live here: Success stories | monday.com

posts.author: Kacey-monday.com (Kacey )
posts.cookedHtml: @Gretchen this is a seriously robust use case!! Really appreciate you sharing with the Community - thank you!

posts.author: Gretchen (Gretchen Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml: @Kacey-monday.com Thanks, appreciate it! (Also, shameless ask…would I be one of the first 50 responders and get some swag? )

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Gretchen,

Yes of course you’ll be included! If you have some time, could you perhaps provide some information about the whole workflow here and how it works?

posts.author: Gretchen (Gretchen Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Julia, Happy to, but I thought it was pretty fully covered in the original Story link that I included in the first post. Is there a specific part of the workflow that I need to elaborate on or you’d like more info about?
